docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE QUEENA C. HO. FILED BY REPELLIN, LUCIEN TAGEOS, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 11/13/2013 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT REPELLIN, LUCIEN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TAGEOS, INC $6,974.51 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,079.51, THE APRIL 16, 2013 LETTER WAS MADE ON ITS FACE BY "TAGEOS HQ" AND "TAGEOS INC" WITH MATTHIEV PICON SIGNING AS CEO, MAKING TAGEOS, INC.A PROPER PARTY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLIAMS JUDGMENT OF 11/13/2013. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF REPELLIN, LUCIEN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,974.51 FILED BY REPELLIN, LUCIEN AS TO DEFENDANT TAGEOS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TAGEOS, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEAN YVES LENDORMY--SECRETARY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REPELLIN, LUCIEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAGEOS, INC $6,974.51 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,079.51, PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED VIA LETTER OF 16 APRIL 2013 THAT DEFENDANT ACKNOWLEDGES OBLIGATION TO PAY FOR PROFESSIONAL FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:13am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause Called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant,Tageos, Inc. appears by attorney, Conor D. Mack with witness Jean Yves Lendormy; Respondent, Lucien Repellin, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and rewpond to questions from Judge Myles. Appellant, Tageos, Inc. submit trial brief in open court.

EXHR (A) BILLING STATEMENTS AND EXPENSES

9:45AM
NEWLY EVIDENCE OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT RETAINED. MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Judgment Entered
